summary: Frontend-only regression testing of 5 bug fixes on /play page. All 5 bugs confirmed FIXED. Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Pet: Mojo (Indie, soul_score=0.95 → 95). /dine regression also PASSES.

test_results.BUG1_activity_profile_score: PASS — Activity Profile bar found (data-testid=activity-profile). Drawer opens with score=95, filled orange progress bar (95% width, linear-gradient). liveScore correctly initialized from pet.soul_score. Energy chip: '⚡ High energy, great napper energy' visible. 'Mira's picks →' link visible.
test_results.BUG2_modal_z_index: PASS — PlayContentModal backdrop z-index=700, modal container z-index=701. Play tab bar (Play & Explore / Find Play / Book a Service) visually covered by dark overlay when Fitness modal is open. Modal opens full-screen without tab bar overlapping inside it.
test_results.BUG3_category_strip_pills: PASS — All 7 pills found: outings, playdates, walking, fitness, swimming, soul, miras-picks. Strip inner CSS: justifyContent=normal (not center), paddingLeft=12px. Strip scrolls properly, no pills cut off.
test_results.BUG4_mira_picks_real_products: PASS — Mira's Play Picks section shows 4 real product cards (play-pick-card-0 through 3). Each card has image, score bar (e.g. 75, 65), and product/service name. Zero 'MIRA IMAGINES' dark concept cards found. Fallback to pillar-products API is working.
test_results.BUG5_services_tab: PASS — Book a Service tab (play-tab-services) renders: GuidedPlayPaths (heading 'Guided Play Paths for Mojo' with Park Routine, Playdate Starter, Swim Confidence paths), PlayConcierge (concierge text present), PlayConciergeSection (data-testid=play-personally-section found, 8 service cards). Both headings confirmed: 'Guided Play Paths for Mojo' and 'Book a play experience for Mojo'.
test_results.REGRESSION_dine: PASS — /dine page loads with Mojo context (Soul 95% badge, Food & Nourishment for Mojo, Allergy:Chicken, Loves:Salmon, dine-category-strip found with Daily Meals / Treats & Rew... / Supplements / Frozen & Fres... tabs)

critical_code_review_comments: ActivityProfile bar collapsed view shows energy chip but not explicit size/weight chip - only 'Indie' (breed) shown in hero section. This is acceptable design but the test requirement mentioned '(energy, size)' chips - energy chip IS present in AP bar text.
PlayContentModal mobile mode still has zIndex:56 in motion div style (internal), but outer portal containers correctly use 700/701 - effective rendering is correct.

Mira's Picks section falls back to pillar-products API (not AI-scored) returning 4 service-type picks. These are real product/service cards with images and score bars. Pre-existing behavior noted in iteration_173.
PlaySoulPage.jsx is 1486 lines - still large but not a blocking issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bugs from this iteration are fixed and verified. Auth: dipali@clubconcierge.in/test123, selectedPetId=pet-mojo-7327ad56. Important: must visit /pet-home first before /play to set selectedPetId in localStorage, else pet gate shows. Play page: ActivityProfile drawer shows 95% score (initialized from soul_score). Category strip: 7 pills, no justifyContent:center. Fitness modal: z-index 700/701, covers play tab bar. Mira's Picks: real product cards with fallback API. Book a Service tab: GuidedPlayPaths + PlayConcierge + PlayConciergeSection (8 service cards). Dine regression: working correctly.
visual_observations: Activity Profile bar collapsed: '🌳 Mojo's Activity Profile | ⚡ High energy, great napper energy | Mira's picks →'
Activity Profile drawer expanded: '95%' prominently displayed with orange filled progress bar
Hero section shows: Mojo avatar, 'Soul 95%' green badge, energy chip '⚡ High energy, great napper energy', breed chip '🐕 Indie'
Category strip: 7 pills starting from Outings & Parks, scrollable right to Mira's Picks
Fitness modal: Dark overlay with '💪 Fitness & Training' header, Mira quote, loading products. Play tab bar NOT visible inside modal.
Mira's Picks section: 4 real cards with dog/service images and score bars (74-75 range), 'SERVICE' badges
Book a Service tab: Shows 'Guided Play Paths for Mojo' cards (The Park Routine, Playdate Starter, Swim Confidence) with 'Start path → ✦ Mira' buttons
Dine page: Dark peach/orange hero with Mojo avatar + Soul 95% badge, food chips (Allergy:Chicken, Loves:Salmon), daily meals category strip
